text.style: font-weight: 700; font-size: 10.3px; font-family: 'DejaVu Serif', serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #15191f

g.text: TxBench-PP is a focused small-molecule slice of TherapeuticsBench

text.style: font-size: 7.1px; font-family: 'DejaVu Serif', serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #5f6872

g.text: The broader roadmap is organized by stage and modality; the current benchmark tests recurring cluster decisions.
